name: CHIMERA INVESTMENT CORP
summary: Chimera Investment Corporation is an internally managed REIT incorporated in Maryland in 2007 that invests in, originates, and manages primarily residential real estate assets. Products include residential mortgage loans, Non-Agency RMBS, Agency RMBS, Agency CMBS, MSRs, business purpose loans, RTLs, HELOCs, and reverse mortgages. Through subsidiary HomeXpress, it originates consumer Non-QM, investor business purpose, and QM residential mortgage loans. It also provides third-party investment management and advisory services via subsidiary Palisades Advisory Services LLC.
